context: Extend the inheritance-merge fixture with semantic dir names and real YAML auto-merge ops, then add a 4-test E2E matrix (one test per chain depth) in tests/cli_e2e_inheritance_merge.rs. Each test parses merge.yaml with serde_yaml and asserts on specific keys. The superseded apply_succeeds_in_inheritance_merge_delta test in tests/cli_e2e_local_fs_repos.rs is deleted at the end. Six commits total; each task below produces exactly one commit (except the final verification task).

tasks.name: Rename fixture dirs to semantic names and add YAML auto-merge ops

Overwrite upstream-intermediate/.common-repo.yaml with `- repo: url: ../upstream-base` then a `- yaml:` auto-merge block (exact YAML in plan doc Step 2)
Overwrite upstream-overlay/.common-repo.yaml with `- repo: url: ../upstream-intermediate` then a `- yaml:` auto-merge block (exact YAML in plan doc Step 3)
Overwrite consumer/.common-repo.yaml with just `- repo: url: ../upstream-overlay` (no local YAML op — exact YAML in plan doc Step 4)
Leave upstream-*/merge.yaml files UNCHANGED — the fixture payload is already append_unique-friendly
Spot-check by running: cargo nextest run --test schema_parsing_test inheritance-merge 2>&1 | tail -20 — expect 4 .common-repo.yaml files parse green

notes: Every task except final-ci-verification produces exactly ONE commit. Task dependencies are strictly linear (blocked_by chain) because each task mutates tests/cli_e2e_inheritance_merge.rs; there is no parallelism.

The rename-and-wire-fixture task intentionally leaves apply_succeeds_in_inheritance_merge_delta failing — it is deleted in delete-superseded-test. A reviewer looking at individual commits will see a transient red test from commit 1 to commit 5, then it disappears. Document this in the commit message body.

The merge_at_intermediate_combines_base and merge_at_overlay_chains_through_intermediate tests have inferred-expected list orders and dedup behaviour. The design doc explicitly flags this as two open questions. If the first run contradicts expectations, apply the discovery-event protocol in the plan markdown Step 3 (update assertion + add Observed: comment for wrong-assumption, escalate for suspected bug).
After any edit to cli_e2e_inheritance_merge.rs, start a fresh background ./script/test run so the baseline stays current (per CLAUDE.md Agent Session Protocol).

Future work tracked in the design doc (not this plan): format fan-out to TOML/JSON/INI/XML/Markdown, array_mode append/replace coverage, symmetric consumer-contributes fixture, snapshot testing migration, regression tests for pending bugs.
